FX.title: USD/JPY Outlook: Geopolitical De-escalation and Equity Record Highs Signal Bullish Momentum
tldr_points: US equity record highs reflect risk-on appetite
Geopolitical cooling in Middle East reduces JPY safe-haven demand
Fed's Daly indicates cautious business optimism supporting USD stability
FX.excerpt: Analysis of USD/JPY amid US equity highs and Middle East de-escalation; AI identifies upside potential.
FX.comment: Risk-on sentiment and geopolitical cooling reduce JPY safe-haven demand.
